---
applyTo: '**'
---
c++ without modern features, no comments in code, do not keep not implemented code, class names PascalCase, function names snake_case, variables in snake_case, private variables _snake_case, performance first, cpu cache hit first, no smart pointers, follow the existing code style, vendor folder is for submodules, do not change any file inside submodules, no legacy compatibility layer or codeblocks needed, all refactors must be complete and through, no partial implementations, no duplicate logic, code should not look like AI generated. code must be maintainable. all implementations needs tests generated. all test cases must be covered. all edge cases must be covered. no makeshift code, no hacks, no workarounds, no shortcuts allowed, implementations must be clean, performant and logical.
